<user_query>
in ocp4-scan-konflux we are seeing degrated performance with gitclone - its because we are using the GH App ID. i removed the app id from the jenkins job so that it will fall back to GITHUB_TOKEN (check to see if this actually fixes the rate limiting)

But i want to deprecate GITHUB_TOKEN in favor of GH App id. so how can i make the token use auth
</user_query>
